use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, dialogs, and call-to-action areas
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Secondary navigation or alternative action selection
Outline-styled buttons for less prominent UI actions
Ghost buttons for minimal UI with subtle hover feedback
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with proper hover states, focus-visible accessibility, and disabled states. Designed as a foundational atomic component for design systems, providing consistent button styling across applications.
